chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 464 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.2482/2025 3. For hearing of main case 25.02.2025 Mr. Ahmed Ali Hussain, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Khalid Rajpar, advocate for respondent along with Hafiz M. Qasim Rabbani, A.D. Post Clearance Audit Qazi Abdul Haleem Siddiqui, Deputy Attorney General Mr. Khalid Rajpar, learned counsel for respondent states that seizure has already been effected, therefore, statutory adjudication process has to be followed by the petitioner in order to allay his grievance.Learned counsel for the petitioner states that the petitioner shall agitate its grievance before the concerned forum, however, seeks that the consignment be placed in Common Pool Fund (C.P.F.) Bonded Warehouse. Mr. Khalid Rajper states that the petitioner remains at liberty to make such application to the concerned authority and any such application will be determined within one week of filing, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. Under such terms learned counsel jointly state that the petition may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
